title: Center group Image-Mask reveal on 3D-rotated group (L6 LEAD)
goal: Center 12.35 dB. Group-level image mask on comp groups; 3D-rotated groups can't use screen-space mask rasterization (guard skips them -> unmasked -> engine settles on photo A at tail; GT shows photo B). Rule 10: fct minimize Stylized__Center. Reuse Concentric's cameraZ-perspective mask rasterization approach for 3D-rotated groups. DoD: >=13, gate net-positive.
